description_long: This is a single-story residential house with a hip roof and a brick exterior. The front yard is enclosed by a low stone and metal fence, featuring a central gate and a paved walkway leading to the main door. The house has a symmetrical arrangement of rectangular windows with black frames, and the main entryway is accentuated by a white door with glass panels. A large, leafy tree and several conical shrubs are present in the front yard, adding greenery and visual interest. The roof is dark gray with a gentle slope on all sides, typical of hip roof designs. The overall appearance is neat and suburban, with a focus on simplicity and functionality.
description: A single-story brick house with a hip roof, symmetrical windows, and a fenced front yard featuring a tree and shrubs. The main entryway is central with a white door and a paved path.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, central gate, paved path, large tree, and symmetrical windows.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the hip roof, brick wall, and the fenced yard with visible shrubs and tree.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a continuous row of windows and the full expanse of the hip roof, with no visible entryway.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the brick wall, windows, and the landscaped yard with shrubs and the large tree.
attribute_entryway_design: Central white door with glass panels, paved path, no porch, and a low fence with a gate.
